mapper.sql: id , live_id, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_card, visit_time, leave_time, content, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_visit (id, live_id, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_card, visit_time, leave_time, content, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{visitorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitorPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitorCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_visit
id,
live_id,
visitor_name,
visitor_phone,
visitor_card,
visit_time,
leave_time,
content,
status,
create_time,
update_time,

mapper.update:
update t_visit
live_id = #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
visitor_name = #{visitorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
visitor_phone = #{visitorPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
visitor_card = #{visitorCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
visit_time = #{visitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
leave_time = #{leaveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_visit set live_id = #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, visitor_name = #{visitorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visitor_phone = #{visitorPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visitor_card = #{visitorCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visit_time = #{visitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, leave_time = #{leaveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
